goal: complex_real_smul(r, z) = Complex.new(r * z.re, r * z.im)
proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Complex) { Complex.new(x0 * x1.re, x0 * x1.im) = complex_real_smul(x0, x1) }(r, z)

goal: z * Complex.from_real(r) = Complex.new(z.re * r, z.im * r)

proof: function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(r, z.re)
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(r, z.im)

goal: Complex.new(z.re * r, z.im * r) = Complex.new(r * z.re, r * z.im)

proof: function(x0: Complex, x1: Complex) { x0 * x1 = x1 * x0 }(z, Complex.from_real(r))

goal: norm_smul_constraint[Real, Complex](complex_real_module.smul) = forall(x0: Real, x1: Complex) { complex_real_module.smul(x0, x1).norm = x0.norm * x1.norm }
proof: function[T0: lib(normed_field).NormedField, T1: lib(normed_add_comm_group).NormedAddCommGroup](x0: (T0, T1) -> T1) { forall(x1: T0, x2: T1) { x0(x1, x2).norm = x1.norm * x2.norm } = norm_smul_constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[Real, Complex](complex_real_module.smul)

goal: exists(k0: Real) { exists(k1: Complex) { complex_real_module.smul(k0, k1).norm != k0.norm * k1.norm } }
exists(k0: Complex) { complex_real_module.smul(r, k0).norm != r.norm * k0.norm }

proof: function[T0: lib(normed_field).NormedField, T1: lib(normed_add_comm_group).NormedAddCommGroup](x0: lib(module).Module[T0, T1]) { norm_smul_constraint[T0, T1](x0.smul) = NormedSpace.constraint[T0, T1](x0) }[Real, Complex](complex_real_module)

goal: exists(k0: NormedSpace[Real, Complex]) { NormedSpace.new[Real, Complex](complex_real_module) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: lib(normed_field).NormedField, T1: lib(normed_add_comm_group).NormedAddCommGroup](x0: lib(module).Module[T0, T1]) { not NormedSpace.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: NormedSpace[T0, T1]) { NormedSpace.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[NormedSpace[T0, T1]](k0) } }[Real, Complex](complex_real_module)
